member.name: T:PdfSharp.Diagnostics.DebuggerDisplayHelper
member.summary: Try to fix a ReSharper issue.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Diagnostics.DebuggerDisplayHelper.FixReSharperBugInConnectionWithCultureInfo_numInfo
member.summary: Prevent ReSharper from saying: Evaluation of method {MyType}.get_DebuggerDisplay requires reading field System.Globalization.CultureInfo._numInfo, which is not available in this context.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Diagnostics.DebuggerDisplayHelper.DebugNumberFormat
member.summary: Number format DebuggerDisplay.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Diagnostics.DebuggerDisplayHelper.InvariantCulture
member.summary: Get my own copy of InvariantCulture that ReSharper can use.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.DotNetFrameworkExtensions.BigIntegerExtensions
member.summary: PDFsharp extensions for .NET types.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.DotNetFrameworkExtensions.BigIntegerExtensions.<G>$9CFAEDA43E3429DBE35978030E0B8E1A.CreateBigInteger(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Implements the .NET 6 BigInteger constructor missing in .NET framework 4.6.2. Initializes a new instance of the BigInteger structure using the values in a read-only span of bytes, and optionally indicating the signing encoding and the endianness byte order.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.DotNetFrameworkExtensions.ConcurrentDictionaryExtensions
member.summary: PDFsharp extensions for .NET types.

member.summary: Extensions for ConcurrentDictionary.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.DotNetFrameworkExtensions.DictionaryExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for Dictionary.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.DotNetFrameworkExtensions.DictionaryExtensions.<G>$E42DFDC8D24EBEA929FB244FBCDF3D61`2.TryAdd(`0,`1)
member.summary: Implementation of TryAdd.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.DotNetFrameworkExtensions.EnumExtensions
member.summary: PDFsharp extensions for .NET types.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.DotNetFrameworkExtensions.EnumExtensions.<G>$8E5C3F0AE356A7A1CAD4B372112D6A6D.<M>$9CE985ACD695B24F7EBC7691909E2B7B
member.summary: Extensions for Enum.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.DotNetFrameworkExtensions.EnumExtensions.<G>$8E5C3F0AE356A7A1CAD4B372112D6A6D.Parse``1(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Brings "Parse<T>(string)" to Enum.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.DotNetFrameworkExtensions.StringExtensions
member.summary: PDFsharp extensions for .NET types.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.DotNetFrameworkExtensions.StringExtensions.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.<M>$07432F514CDD0D7CB2342070C1234ECC
member.summary: Extensions for String.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.DotNetFrameworkExtensions.StringExtensions.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.NullOrEmpty
member.summary: The functionality I missed since C# 1.0.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.DotNetFrameworkExtensions.StringExtensions.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.StartsWith(System.Char)
member.summary: Brings "bool StartsWith(char value)" to String class.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.DotNetFrameworkExtensions.StringExtensions.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.EndsWith(System.Char)
member.summary: Brings "bool EndsWith(char value)" to String class.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Threading.Locks
member.summary: Static locking functions to make PDFsharp thread save.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.AnsiEncoding
member.summary: An encoder use for PDF WinAnsi encoding. It is by design not to use CodePagesEncodingProvider.Instance.GetEncoding(1252). However, AnsiEncoding is equivalent to Windows-1252 (CP-1252), see https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Windows-1252

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.AnsiEncoding.GetByteCount(System.Char[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the byte count.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.AnsiEncoding.GetBytes(System.Char[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the bytes.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.AnsiEncoding.GetCharCount(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the character count.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.AnsiEncoding.GetChars(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Char[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the chars.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.AnsiEncoding.GetMaxByteCount(System.Int32)
member.summary: When overridden in a derived class, calculates the maximum number of bytes produced by encoding the specified number of characters.
member.param: The number of characters to encode.
member.returns: The maximum number of bytes produced by encoding the specified number of characters.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.AnsiEncoding.GetMaxCharCount(System.Int32)
member.summary: When overridden in a derived class, calculates the maximum number of characters produced by decoding the specified number of bytes.
member.param: The number of bytes to decode.
member.returns: The maximum number of characters produced by decoding the specified number of bytes.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.AnsiEncoding.Encoder
member.summary: Gets the ANSI encoder singleton.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.AnsiEncoding.IsAnsi(System.Char)
member.summary: Indicates whether the specified Unicode BMP character is available in the ANSI code page 1252.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.AnsiEncoding.IsAnsi(System.String)
member.summary: Indicates whether the specified string is available in the ANSI code page 1252.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.AnsiEncoding.IsAnsi(System.Int32[])
member.summary: Indicates whether all code points in the specified array are available in the ANSI code page 1252.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.AnsiEncoding.UnicodeToAnsi(System.Char,System.Char)
member.summary: Maps Unicode to ANSI (CP-1252). Return an ANSI code in a char or the value of parameter nonAnsi if Unicode value has no ANSI counterpart.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.AnsiEncoding.AnsiToUnicode
member.summary: Maps WinAnsi to Unicode characters. The 5 undefined ANSI value 81, 8D, 8F, 90, and 9D are mapped to the C1 control code. This is the same as .NET handles them.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.IO_dummy.StreamToMemoryReader
member.summary: Reads any stream into a Memory<byte>.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.IO_dummy.StreamToMemoryReader.#ctor(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Reads any stream into a Memory<byte>.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.IO_dummy.StreamToMemoryReader.ReadToEnd
member.summary: Reads a stream to the end.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Logging.LogCategory
member.summary: Defines the logging categories of PDFsharp.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Logging.LogCategory.PdfSharp
member.summary: Default category for standard logger.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Logging.LogHost
member.summary: Provides a single global logger factory used for logging in PDFsharp.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Logging.LogHost.Factory
member.summary: Gets or sets the current global logger factory singleton for PDFsharp. Every logger used in PDFsharp code is created by this factory. You can change the logger factory at any one time you want. If no factory is provided the NullLoggerFactory is used as the default.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Logging.LogHost.Logger
member.summary: Gets the global PDFsharp default logger.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Logging.LogHost.CreateLogger(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a logger with a given category name.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Logging.LogHost.CreateLogger``1
member.summary: Creates a logger with the full name of the given type as category name.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Logging.LogHost.ResetLogging
member.summary: Resets the logging host to the state it has immediately after loading the PDFsharp library.
member.remarks: This function is only useful in unit test scenarios and not intended to be called from application code.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Pdf.Signatures.PdfMessageDigestType
member.summary: Specifies the algorithm used to generate the message digest.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Pdf.Signatures.IDigitalSigner
member.summary: Interface for classes that generate digital signatures.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Pdf.Signatures.IDigitalSigner.CertificateName
member.summary: Gets a human-readable name of the used certificate.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Pdf.Signatures.IDigitalSigner.GetSignatureSizeAsync
member.summary: Gets the size of the signature in bytes. The size is used to reserve space in the PDF file that is later filled with the signature.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Pdf.Signatures.IDigitalSigner.GetSignatureAsync(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Gets the signatures of the specified stream.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.PlugIn.IPdfSharpPlugInV0
member.summary: Provisionally plug-in interface. Internal use only.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.PlugIn.IPdfSharpPlugInV0.ID
member.summary: Gets the GUID of the plug-in.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.PlugIn.IPdfSharpPlugInV0.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the plug-in.
